prompt.title: Catch me up
prompt.text: I've been out for [N] days. Catch me up on [project/channel]: what changed, what decisions were made, what needs my attention, and anything I was @mentioned in.

tip.tip: Ask Copilot to 'summarize my notes from this section', 'turn these notes into a to-do list', or 'draft a plan based on this brainstorm' to convert messy notes into structured next steps.

capability.name: Copilot Notebooks
capability.text: Pull Teams meetings, Outlook emails, and web content in as sources, then generate richer outputs like Excel worksheets and infographics directly from your notebook.

roadmap.title: Engage prospects faster with Sales Agent-enriched leads
roadmap.description: To reach their sales goals, sales teams need to constantly generate enough pipeline. They need to decide which inbound leads to engage. This decision takes a lot of time because sellers must sift through large amounts of data across tools and data sources. This data includes information from internal systems like their CRM and external resources like the web and third-party data services. Sales Agent handles the work of reviewing every available data source to create a comprehensive summary for each lead. As a seller, you can quickly decide whether to engage with a prospect or pass on them. Sales Agent reviews every lead in your queue and gathers information. It synthesizes insights that are specific to your business. At a glance, you can see if a lead is worth reaching out to and what they're interested in. Use this information to personalize your engagement with the prospect. With Sales Agent, you spend less time and get higher response rates, leading to a larger, more qualified pipeline.

reads.title: Available today: OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 in Microsoft 365 Copilot
Available today: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

editions.copyText:
MICROSOFT 365 COPILOT — CHAMPION WEEKLY (July 16, 2026)

PROMPT OF THE WEEK — Catch me up
"I've been out for [N] days. Catch me up on [project/channel]: what changed, what decisions were made, what needs my attention, and anything I was @mentioned in."

COPILOT IN ONENOTE
Ask Copilot to 'summarize my notes from this section', 'turn these notes into a to-do list', or 'draft a plan based on this brainstorm' to convert messy notes into structured next steps.

FRONTIER SPOTLIGHT — Copilot Notebooks
Pull Teams meetings, Outlook emails, and web content in as sources, then generate richer outputs like Excel worksheets and infographics directly from your notebook.
Learn more: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/frontier-features

ON THE ROADMAP — Engage prospects faster with Sales Agent-enriched leads (In development)
To reach their sales goals, sales teams need to constantly generate enough pipeline. They need to decide which inbound leads to engage. This decision takes a lot of time because sellers must sift through large amounts of data across tools and data sources. This data includes information from internal systems like their CRM and external resources like the web and third-party data services. Sales Agent handles the work of reviewing every available data source to create a comprehensive summary for each lead. As a seller, you can quickly decide whether to engage with a prospect or pass on them. Sales Agent reviews every lead in your queue and gathers information. It synthesizes insights that are specific to your business. At a glance, you can see if a lead is worth reaching out to and what they're interested in. Use this information to personalize your engagement with the prospect. With Sales Agent, you spend less time and get higher response rates, leading to a larger, more qualified pipeline.
Details: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/roadmap?id=567000

WORTH A READ
- Available today: OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 in Microsoft 365 Copilot — https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/microsoft-365-copilot-blog/available-today-openai-s-gpt-5-6-in-microsoft-365-copilot/ba-p/4533152
- Available today: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 in Microsoft 365 Copilot — https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/microsoft-365-copilot-blog/available-today-anthropic-s-claude-sonnet-5-in-microsoft-365/ba-p/4532188

Questions? Reach your Copilot Champion. Built for guidance only; references public Microsoft sources.

prompt.title: Build a project tracker
prompt.text: From these notes, create a project plan: phases, key milestones with target dates, risks with mitigations, and a RACI for the core team. Output it as a table I can paste into a doc.

tip.tip: Promote a great Copilot answer into a Copilot Page, then @mention teammates to co-edit. It's the fastest way to turn an AI draft into shared, living team content.

capability.name: Copilot Cowork
capability.text: Describe the outcome you want and Cowork plans the steps and takes action across your files and conversations — completing long-running, multi-step work. Now supports plugins and mobile.

roadmap.title: Engage customers across multiple channels (web, voice, SMS & email)
roadmap.description: A multi-channel outreach capability, spanning web chat, voice, SMS, and email, is critical for meeting customers in the channel they naturally prefer and increasing the likelihood of timely engagement. By activating the agent across multiple surfaces, we ensure continuity of conversations, reduce drop-off when a single channel fails, and support the FY27 goal of always-on, end-to-end engagement from initial intent to close. This creates higher response rates, faster qualification, and a more seamless handoff to sales motions.

reads.title: Available today: OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 in Microsoft 365 Copilot
Available today: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

editions.copyText:
MICROSOFT 365 COPILOT — CHAMPION WEEKLY (July 9, 2026)

PROMPT OF THE WEEK — Build a project tracker
"From these notes, create a project plan: phases, key milestones with target dates, risks with mitigations, and a RACI for the core team. Output it as a table I can paste into a doc."

COPILOT IN LOOP / PAGES
Promote a great Copilot answer into a Copilot Page, then @mention teammates to co-edit. It's the fastest way to turn an AI draft into shared, living team content.

FRONTIER SPOTLIGHT — Copilot Cowork
Describe the outcome you want and Cowork plans the steps and takes action across your files and conversations — completing long-running, multi-step work. Now supports plugins and mobile.
Learn more: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/frontier-features

ON THE ROADMAP — Engage customers across multiple channels (web, voice, SMS & email) (In development)
A multi-channel outreach capability, spanning web chat, voice, SMS, and email, is critical for meeting customers in the channel they naturally prefer and increasing the likelihood of timely engagement. By activating the agent across multiple surfaces, we ensure continuity of conversations, reduce drop-off when a single channel fails, and support the FY27 goal of always-on, end-to-end engagement from initial intent to close. This creates higher response rates, faster qualification, and a more seamless handoff to sales motions.
Details: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/roadmap?id=567001

WORTH A READ
- Available today: OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 in Microsoft 365 Copilot — https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/microsoft-365-copilot-blog/available-today-openai-s-gpt-5-6-in-microsoft-365-copilot/ba-p/4533152
- Available today: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 in Microsoft 365 Copilot — https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/microsoft-365-copilot-blog/available-today-anthropic-s-claude-sonnet-5-in-microsoft-365/ba-p/4532188

Questions? Reach your Copilot Champion. Built for guidance only; references public Microsoft sources.

prompt.title: Find the signal in my inbox
prompt.text: Review my unread email from the past week and group it into 'Needs my reply', 'FYI', and 'Can wait'. For the first group, draft a one-line suggested reply for each.

tip.tip: Use the work grounding to ask cross-app questions: 'What are the latest updates on [project] from my emails, chats, and files?' Then turn the answer into a Copilot Page to collaborate on it.

capability.name: Finance Agent
capability.text: Gives finance teams and stakeholders a centralized, role-aware view of financial performance with up-to-date, permission-aware insights.

roadmap.title: Add custom insights to record summaries in Sales agent
roadmap.description: Sales agent gives you strong CRM-based account and opportunity summaries, but important context is often spread across non-CRM systems. With this capability, you can add insights from any application to enrich account and opportunity summaries in Sales agent, so sellers get a unified view of their accounts and deals in one place without switching applications.

reads.title: Available today: OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 in Microsoft 365 Copilot
Available today: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

editions.copyText:
MICROSOFT 365 COPILOT — CHAMPION WEEKLY (July 2, 2026)

PROMPT OF THE WEEK — Find the signal in my inbox
"Review my unread email from the past week and group it into 'Needs my reply', 'FYI', and 'Can wait'. For the first group, draft a one-line suggested reply for each."

COPILOT IN COPILOT CHAT
Use the work grounding to ask cross-app questions: 'What are the latest updates on [project] from my emails, chats, and files?' Then turn the answer into a Copilot Page to collaborate on it.

FRONTIER SPOTLIGHT — Finance Agent
Gives finance teams and stakeholders a centralized, role-aware view of financial performance with up-to-date, permission-aware insights.
Learn more: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/frontier-features

ON THE ROADMAP — Add custom insights to record summaries in Sales agent (In development)
Sales agent gives you strong CRM-based account and opportunity summaries, but important context is often spread across non-CRM systems. With this capability, you can add insights from any application to enrich account and opportunity summaries in Sales agent, so sellers get a unified view of their accounts and deals in one place without switching applications.
Details: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/roadmap?id=567002

WORTH A READ

Questions? Reach your Copilot Champion. Built for guidance only; references public Microsoft sources.

prompt.title: Draft, then sharpen
prompt.text: Draft a [proposal/update/announcement] about [topic] for [audience]. Keep it under 200 words, confident and concrete. Then give me an alternate version that's more concise and one that's more persuasive.

tip.tip: During or after a meeting, ask Copilot to 'recap the key points', 'list action items and owners', or 'what was decided about [topic]?'. Catch up on long chats with 'summarize what I missed'.

capability.name: Researcher
capability.text: A reasoning agent that runs deeper, multi-step research across your work and the web to produce thorough, cited answers for complex questions.

roadmap.title: Enrich Sales agent meeting prep with more data sources
roadmap.description: Walking into a customer meeting with incomplete context can mean missed risks, overlooked issues, and conversations that fall flat. With access to richer data, like service tickets, directly in your meeting prep, you can spot open issues and opportunities before the conversation starts. This insight helps you engage more meaningfully, build stronger relationships, and drive better sales outcomes.

reads.title: Available today: OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 in Microsoft 365 Copilot
Available today: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 in Microsoft 365 Copilot

COPILOT IN TEAMS
During or after a meeting, ask Copilot to 'recap the key points', 'list action items and owners', or 'what was decided about [topic]?'. Catch up on long chats with 'summarize what I missed'.

prompt.title: Prep me for a 1:1
prompt.text: Using our recent emails, chats, and shared files, prepare me for my 1:1 with [name]. Summarize what we last agreed, what's outstanding, and suggest three thoughtful questions to ask.

tip.tip: Try 'summarize this email thread', 'draft a reply that politely declines', or 'turn this email into a meeting agenda'. Coaching tips can also score your draft for tone, clarity, and reader sentiment before you send.

capability.name: Agentic Copilot in Outlook
capability.text: Copilot can carry out multi-step inbox and calendar tasks over time — triaging email, organizing messages, and resolving meeting conflicts.

roadmap.title: Microsoft 365 app: New Copilot Notebooks design in the Microsoft 365 Copilot App (iOS)
roadmap.description: Copilot Notebooks in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app (iOS) now lets users organize related chats, output creations, and references into a persistent AI workspace. Copilot uses the Notebook's accumulated context to ground responses, so work continues across sessions instead of starting over each time.

reads.title: Available today: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 in Microsoft 365 Copilot
Sales Agent is now generally available: Bringing customer and deal intelligence into the flow of work

editions.copyText:
MICROSOFT 365 COPILOT — CHAMPION WEEKLY (June 18, 2026)

PROMPT OF THE WEEK — Prep me for a 1:1
"Using our recent emails, chats, and shared files, prepare me for my 1:1 with [name]. Summarize what we last agreed, what's outstanding, and suggest three thoughtful questions to ask."

COPILOT IN OUTLOOK
Try 'summarize this email thread', 'draft a reply that politely declines', or 'turn this email into a meeting agenda'. Coaching tips can also score your draft for tone, clarity, and reader sentiment before you send.

FRONTIER SPOTLIGHT — Agentic Copilot in Outlook
Copilot can carry out multi-step inbox and calendar tasks over time — triaging email, organizing messages, and resolving meeting conflicts.
Learn more: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/frontier-features

ON THE ROADMAP — Microsoft 365 app: New Copilot Notebooks design in the Microsoft 365 Copilot App (iOS) (In development)
Copilot Notebooks in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app (iOS) now lets users organize related chats, output creations, and references into a persistent AI workspace. Copilot uses the Notebook's accumulated context to ground responses, so work continues across sessions instead of starting over each time.
Details: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/roadmap?id=566318

WORTH A READ

Questions? Reach your Copilot Champion. Built for guidance only; references public Microsoft sources.

prompt.title: Compare and recommend
prompt.text: Compare these [proposals/vendors/options] across cost, risk, time-to-value, and effort in a table. Recommend one and explain the trade-offs in two sentences.

tip.tip: Turn a Word doc into a deck: 'create a presentation from this document'. Then refine with 'add a slide summarizing the budget' or 'make this slide more visual'. Use 'summarize this presentation' to brief yourself fast.

capability.name: Microsoft Scout
capability.text: An AI desktop app that stays connected to your priorities, monitors what matters, and moves work forward across the Microsoft 365 apps you use every day.

roadmap.title: Work IQ APIs: Pay-As-You-Go usage
roadmap.description: Enables metered, pay-as-you-go access to Work IQ endpoints, allowing developers to invoke agents and capabilities without requiring pre-assigned licenses, with usage billed based on the agents and models invoked per request.

reads.title: Copilot in Excel: Built for the era of Frontier Finance
Copilot Cowork is now generally available

editions.copyText:
MICROSOFT 365 COPILOT — CHAMPION WEEKLY (June 11, 2026)

PROMPT OF THE WEEK — Compare and recommend
"Compare these [proposals/vendors/options] across cost, risk, time-to-value, and effort in a table. Recommend one and explain the trade-offs in two sentences."

COPILOT IN POWERPOINT
Turn a Word doc into a deck: 'create a presentation from this document'. Then refine with 'add a slide summarizing the budget' or 'make this slide more visual'. Use 'summarize this presentation' to brief yourself fast.

FRONTIER SPOTLIGHT — Microsoft Scout
An AI desktop app that stays connected to your priorities, monitors what matters, and moves work forward across the Microsoft 365 apps you use every day.
Learn more: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/frontier-features

ON THE ROADMAP — Work IQ APIs: Pay-As-You-Go usage (In development)
Enables metered, pay-as-you-go access to Work IQ endpoints, allowing developers to invoke agents and capabilities without requiring pre-assigned licenses, with usage billed based on the agents and models invoked per request.
Details: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/roadmap?id=559017

Questions? Reach your Copilot Champion. Built for guidance only; references public Microsoft sources.

prompt.title: Executive-ready summary
prompt.text: Summarize this document for a busy executive in 5 bullet points, then add a one-line 'so what' that explains the business impact. Flag anything that needs a decision from me.

tip.tip: Select your data and ask Copilot to 'highlight the top trends', 'add a column that calculates [metric]', or 'create a PivotTable summarizing sales by region'. It explains the formulas it writes so you can learn as you go.

capability.name: Copilot Notebooks
capability.text: Pull Teams meetings, Outlook emails, and web content in as sources, then generate richer outputs like Excel worksheets and infographics directly from your notebook.

roadmap.title: Reference an attached PowerPoint deck’s style when creating a new presentation with Agent Mode in PowerPoint
roadmap.description: When creating a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint using Agent Mode, you can reference an existing PowerPoint file, so Copilot applies its theme and styles to the new deck, keeping formatting consistent. Updated June 5, 2026: This feature is still in development and will begin rolling out mid-June 2026. We apologize for the inconvenience.

reads.title: Copilot Cowork is now generally available

editions.copyText:
MICROSOFT 365 COPILOT — CHAMPION WEEKLY (June 4, 2026)

PROMPT OF THE WEEK — Executive-ready summary
"Summarize this document for a busy executive in 5 bullet points, then add a one-line 'so what' that explains the business impact. Flag anything that needs a decision from me."

COPILOT IN EXCEL
Select your data and ask Copilot to 'highlight the top trends', 'add a column that calculates [metric]', or 'create a PivotTable summarizing sales by region'. It explains the formulas it writes so you can learn as you go.

FRONTIER SPOTLIGHT — Copilot Notebooks
Pull Teams meetings, Outlook emails, and web content in as sources, then generate richer outputs like Excel worksheets and infographics directly from your notebook.
Learn more: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/frontier-features

ON THE ROADMAP — Reference an attached PowerPoint deck’s style when creating a new presentation with Agent Mode in PowerPoint (In development)
When creating a presentation with Copilot in PowerPoint using Agent Mode, you can reference an existing PowerPoint file, so Copilot applies its theme and styles to the new deck, keeping formatting consistent. Updated June 5, 2026: This feature is still in development and will begin rolling out mid-June 2026. We apologize for the inconvenience.
Details: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/roadmap?id=555878

Questions? Reach your Copilot Champion. Built for guidance only; references public Microsoft sources.

prompt.title: Turn a meeting into an action plan
prompt.text: Based on the transcript and chat from my last meeting with [team], list every decision made, every open question, and a table of action items with owners and due dates. Then draft a short follow-up email I can send to attendees.

tip.tip: Ask Copilot to 'draft a [document type] from these bullet points', then 'add a section on [topic]' and 'rewrite the intro to be more concise'. Reference an existing file with the / command to ground it in your own content.

capability.name: Copilot Cowork
capability.text: Describe the outcome you want and Cowork plans the steps and takes action across your files and conversations — completing long-running, multi-step work. Now supports plugins and mobile.

roadmap.title: Capture voice notes in the Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app
roadmap.description: With a Microsoft 365 Copilot license, transform offline discussions into structured, actionable, and searchable content with voice notes in Copilot.

reads.title: Available today: Anthropic Claude Fable 5 in Microsoft 365 Copilot
